goal: User-initiated barge-in. Track tts_playing flag around play_audio; in the Deepgram partial handler, if tts_playing and the partial has at least BARGE_IN_PARTIAL_CHARS (default 3) characters, call sounddevice.stop() and flip TTS status to 'barged'. The user's subsequent is_final enters the normal Crosstalk path and starts a fresh turn.
